requirements.task_name: Save 3 budget wedding articles under $10,000 from the last 12 months
requirements.task_description: Find budget-planning articles for weddings under $10,000 that were published in the last 12 months, sort them by popularity, and save exactly 3 of them to your reading list.

requirements.task_name: Save an 8-hour summer outdoor wedding day timeline for 50–150 guests with a 4 PM ceremony
requirements.task_description: Use the timeline tool to configure a wedding day schedule for a summer outdoor wedding with 50–150 guests, an 8-hour event, and a 4:00 PM ceremony, then save that specific timeline template to your planning board.

requirements.task_name: Create a moodboard with 4 sage green and gold color palettes that include neutrals
requirements.task_description: Filter color palette inspiration by tags and palette type to find sage green and gold palettes that include neutral tones, then create a moodboard named “Sage & Gold” and add exactly 4 such palettes to it.

requirements.task_name: Save one venue guide for ~150 guests that mentions a backup indoor space
requirements.task_description: Within the venue guides, compare barn and hotel ballroom articles suitable for around 150 guests and save one article that explicitly mentions a backup indoor space to your reading list.

requirements.task_name: Save a seating layout template for 100–150 guests using mixed round and long tables
requirements.task_description: Find a seating and floorplan article for a guest count of 100–150 that uses both round and long tables, view its sample chart, and save that layout to your planning board.

requirements.task_name: Generate a 6-month wedding checklist for under $15,000 and add 5 tasks to your to-dos
requirements.task_description: Use the checklist tool to create a 6-month planning checklist for a wedding with a budget under $15,000 and 80–120 guests, then add the first 5 tasks from the current month’s section to your to-do list.

requirements.task_name: Add a catering budget article under $60 per guest to your budget planner
requirements.task_description: Within the food and drink section, filter for catering budget breakdowns of $40–$60 per guest, review the first two articles, and add at least one article that lists an average cost of $60 or less per guest to your budget planner.

requirements.task_name: Save 3 DIY decor projects under 2 hours and under $100 to your project list
requirements.task_description: Filter DIY decor tutorials by time and cost so they can be completed in under 2 hours and cost less than $100 each, then add exactly 3 such projects to your project list.
